title: Death Swap
description: DeathSwap, a minigame where you swap positions with other players every 5 minutes and use this mechanic to kill them! [Compatible with 2-8 Players]
body:
### DESCRIPTION
 
  This my version of the deathswap minigame created by SethBling and popularized by dream! In this minigame, players swap positions with each other every 5 minutes, and must use this mechannic to kill the others by environmental damage, by jumping into lava right before a swap for example. You only get to know when a swap is about to happen 5 seconds prior, so you must react quickly!

### INSTALLATION/SETUP GUIDE

generate a new world, put the zip file in the datapacks folder located at:
```
world/datapacks
```
(or put the mod in the mods folder of the server)

execute /reload and run /function deathswap:start to begin! you can also run /function deathswap:config before starting to change settings according to your needs. The settings with their default values are given below:

| Setting                     | Default Value | Description                                                                  |
|-----------------------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Permanent water buckets      | true(1)          | If players get a permanent water bucket                                       |
| Permanent fire resistance    | false(0)         | If players get permanent fire resistance                                      |
| Max death count              | 5             | Maximum number of deaths before a player is eliminated and put into spectator mode |
| Allow nether                 | false(0)         | Set to true to allow the nether dimension                                     |


### OTHER THINGS TO NOTE

- this datapack is compatible with 2-8 players
- the 5 minute timer is currently not configurable through the config menu, but you can change it in line number 70 of game/swap.mcfunction and line 11 of swap.mcfunction, but and you would also have to change line 12-16 and line 71-76 of start.mcfunction and game/swap.mcfunction respectively to adjust the timer according to the changes you've made (for assistance, feel free to join the server ↓)
- for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
